title: MrUltimateShop
description: Custom Shops, Developer API, support mrsellchests, Chest Shop
body:
![Stats](https://mrneznamy.eu/api/stats/badge.svg) *Older versions are not and will not be supported*
# *YOU CAN FIND THE PLUGIN DESCRIPTION AS TEXT BELOW*


Description MrUltimateShop is a comprehensive shop plugin that provides advanced trading features for Minecraft servers with extensive customization options. Features **Shop (GUI)** - Dynamic Shop Loading System - Custom Items API Support - Player-Owned Chest Shop System – Create and manage personal shops - Team-Based Shop Management – Collaborative shop ownership - Holographic Price Displays – Real-time shop information - Advanced Tax System – Configurable transaction fees - Sell GUI with Inventory Management - Buy/Sell Menu System - World-Specific Shop Settings - Comprehensive Logging System - Feature Toggle System - Vault Economy Integration - Extensive Permission System - Configurable Shop Categories - Sound Effects & Visual Feedback **Chest-Shop** - You can full disable chest shops. - Player-Owned Shops – Create personal shops on any allowed block type - Team Management System – Invite team members with role-based permissions - Holographic Price Displays – Real-time price and stock information - Custom Inventory System – Enhanced storage with vanilla hopper compatibility - Tax System – Configurable transaction fees for server economy - Comprehensive GUI Management – Easy-to-use interfaces for all operations - Session-Based Trading – Secure transaction handling - Permission-Based Limits – Configurable shop limits per player - Command Creation: /cshop create while looking at an allowed block - Item Placement: Place special shop items on allowed blocks
Commands & Permissions | Command | Description | Permission | |---------|-------------|------------| | `/mus` | Main command for MrUltimateShop | `mrultimateshop.use` | | `/shop` | Open the main shop menu | `mrultimateshop.shop` | | `/shop sell hand` | Sell item in hand | `mrultimateshop.command.shop.sell.hand` | | `/shop sell gui` | Open sell GUI interface | `mrultimateshop.command.shop.sell.gui` | | `/shop sell all` | Sell all sellable items in inventory | `mrultimateshop.command.shop.sell.all` | | `/cshop` | Chest shop command | `mrultimateshop.cshop` | | `/cshop create` | Create a new chest shop | `mrultimateshop.cshop.create` | | `/cshop give [player]` | Give shop creation item | `mrultimateshop.cshop.give` | | `/cshop team remove` | Remove player from shop team | `mrultimateshop.cshop.team` | | `/cshop team list` | List all team members | `mrultimateshop.cshop.team` | | `/cshop team global-invite [role]` | Add player to ALL shops | `mrultimateshop.cshop.team` | | `/cshop team global-remove` | Remove player from ALL shops | `mrultimateshop.cshop.team` | | `/cshop team invite [role]` | Invite player to shop team | `mrultimateshop.cshop.team` | Permissions | Permission | Description | Default | |------------|-------------|--------| | `mrultimateshop.limit.*` | Dynamic limit permissions (e.g. mrultimateshop.limit.1) | true | | `mrultimateshop.tax.*` | Dynamic tax permissions (e.g. mrultimateshop.tax.5) | true | | `mrultimateshop.admin` | Full admin access to MrUltimateShop | op | | `mrultimateshop.reload` | Permission to reload configuration | op | Supported Item Providers - **MrSellChests** – Boosts, Sell Chests - **ItemsAdder** - Custom Items - **Oraxen** - Custom Items - **HeadDatabase** - Custom Heads
